description: Cross-language Ed25519 test vectors for JACS authentication
note: Generated from the Python fixture at tests/browser/fixtures/jacs_documents/

test_vectors.name: jacs_auth_header
test_vectors.note: Sign 'message' with private key, verify with public key. Format: JACS {jacsId}:{timestamp}:{signature_base64}

test_vectors.name: canonical_json_signature
test_vectors.note: The canonical JSON file is the message that was signed. The signature is in signed_valid_agent.json at jacsSignature.signature. Ed25519 is deterministic so all languages must produce the same signature.
